testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Mass Edit: Selection & Bar row select checkboxes exist for editor users
testcase.classname: row select checkboxes exist for editor users

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Mass Edit: Selection & Bar select-all header checkbox exists for editor users
testcase.classname: select-all header checkbox exists for editor users

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Mass Edit: Selection & Bar me-bar appears after checking a row
testcase.classname: me-bar appears after checking a row

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Mass Edit: Selection & Bar me-bar count reflects selected row count
testcase.classname: me-bar count reflects selected row count

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Mass Edit: Selection & Bar me-bar contains all action buttons
testcase.classname: me-bar contains all action buttons

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Mass Edit: Selection & Bar Deselect All button hides me-bar
testcase.classname: Deselect All button hides me-bar

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Mass Edit: Selection & Bar Deselect All unchecks all visible row checkboxes
testcase.classname: Deselect All unchecks all visible row checkboxes

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Mass Edit: Selection & Bar select-all header checkbox selects all visible rows
testcase.classname: select-all header checkbox selects all visible rows

testsuite.name: OpenSparrow – Mass Edit: Edit Fields Panel

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Mass Edit: Edit Fields Panel Edit Fields button opens mass edit panel
testcase.classname: Edit Fields button opens mass edit panel

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Mass Edit: Edit Fields Panel mass edit panel contains required form elements
testcase.classname: mass edit panel contains required form elements

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Mass Edit: Edit Fields Panel apply button is disabled before preview runs
testcase.classname: apply button is disabled before preview runs

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Mass Edit: Edit Fields Panel column select is populated
testcase.classname: column select is populated

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Mass Edit: Edit Fields Panel null toggle disables value input when checked
testcase.classname: null toggle disables value input when checked

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Mass Edit: Edit Fields Panel close button dismisses mass edit panel
testcase.classname: close button dismisses mass edit panel

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Mass Edit: Edit Fields Panel overlay click dismisses mass edit panel
testcase.classname: overlay click dismisses mass edit panel

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Mass Edit: Edit Fields Panel changing column clears preview and disables apply
testcase.classname: changing column clears preview and disables apply

testsuite.name: OpenSparrow – Mass Edit: Export Column Picker

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Mass Edit: Export Column Picker Export Selected button opens export panel
testcase.classname: Export Selected button opens export panel

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Mass Edit: Export Column Picker export panel contains column checkboxes
testcase.classname: export panel contains column checkboxes

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Mass Edit: Export Column Picker all column checkboxes are checked by default
testcase.classname: all column checkboxes are checked by default

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Mass Edit: Export Column Picker Download CSV button is enabled when columns checked
testcase.classname: Download CSV button is enabled when columns checked

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Mass Edit: Export Column Picker Deselect all disables download button
testcase.classname: Deselect all disables download button

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Mass Edit: Export Column Picker Select all re-enables download button after deselect
testcase.classname: Select all re-enables download button after deselect

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Mass Edit: Export Column Picker export panel shows row count info
testcase.classname: export panel shows row count info

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Mass Edit: Export Column Picker column picker list uses me-col-picker-list container
testcase.classname: column picker list uses me-col-picker-list container

testcase.classname: export panel close button works

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Mass Edit: Assign Owner Panel Assign Owner button opens owner panel

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Mass Edit: Assign Owner Panel owner panel loads user select from API
testcase.classname: owner panel loads user select from API

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Mass Edit: Assign Owner Panel apply button disabled when no user selected

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Mass Edit: Assign Owner Panel selecting a user enables apply button
